Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENTS

Title: Relates to contributions paid into the insurance reserve fund by the Medford fire district
Summary: Authorizes the Medford fire district, located in Suffolk county, to deposit into the insurance reserve fund an amount of $400,000 in each of the years 2026, 2027 and 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT relating to contributions paid into the insurance reserve fund by the Medford fire district
